item.title: Survey data of multidrug-resistant tuberculosis, Tuberculosis patients characteristics and stress resilience during COVID-19 pandemic in West Sumatera Province, Indonesia.
Survey data of COVID-19 awareness, knowledge, preparedness and related behaviors among breast cancer patients in Indonesia.
